sources.page_title: Gyeon Q²M Compound - Fast-Acting Cutting Compound — Polished Bliss
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q²M Compound

by Gyeon

Price: £42.00

Sizes: 120 ml - Sold out | 1 L - £42.00

Availability: Only 2 left!

Images:
- //www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-q2m-compound_1240x1068.jpg?v=1769863891
- //www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-q2m-compound-120ml_1119x1119.jpg?v=1769863892
- //www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-q2m-compound-1l_1119x1119.jpg?v=1769863895

We Say:
There are many excellent ranges of cutting compounds and polishes available on the market these days, so for any new range of polishing products to captivate us they really do have to offer a stand out level of performance. The new line up of Q²M Compound, Q²M Polish and Q² Primer from Gyeon does exactly that. Rather than go down the white-labelling route, Gyeon have instead invested time and effort in developing and manufacturing their own formulas. This approach, while costly, has enabled them to produce a range of polishing products that break new ground. Gyeon Q²M Compound does everything other market leading compounds do, except it cuts faster, generates far less dust (almost none), buffs off more easily, leaves paint feeling smoother and finishes down as well as most finishing polishes. We're impressed to say the least!

Key Features:
- Cut Level: 7/10 (Compared To Others)
- Filling Power: 0/10 (Compared To Others)
- Gloss Level: 9/10 (Compared To Others)

Description:
Gyeon Q²M Compound is a fast-acting abrasive paste designed to permanently remove heavier paint defects such as deep swirl marks, light scratches and acid etching from original and refinished paintwork, and leave a superior high gloss finish ready for further refinement. Comprising a unique blend of coarse precision-milled Japanese diminishing abrasives suspended in a water-based emulsion, Gyeon Q²M Compound offers significant advantages over rival compounds in terms of extremely low dust production, incomparable finish quality and reduced working time. Free of silicones and fillers, it works best with firm foam cutting pads and performs equally well whether used in conjunction with free-spinning or gear-driven dual action polishers, making it ideal for both home and professional use.

Specification:
- Adds Protection: No
- Chemical Basis: Water-based
- Contains Abrasive Particles: Yes (diminishing)
- Contains Fillers And Glazing Oils: No
- Cut Level: 7
- Gloss Level: 9
- Suitable For Hand Use: No
- Suitable For Hard Paints: Yes
- Suitable For Intermediate Paints: Yes
- Suitable For Machine Use: Yes
- Suitable For Soft Paints: Yes

How To Use:
You should use Gyeon Q²M Compound with a machine. For best results using a dual action polisher, Gyeon Q² Compound should be applied to freshly decontaminated paint using either a Gyeon Q²M Eccentric Cutting Pad or a Gyeon Q²M Eccentric Polishing Pad. Only 3-4 pea-sized drops of product are required per 18 x 18 area, and these should be worked in thoroughly at 4000-5000 orbits per minute (speed 4-5 on most dual action polishers) until only a hint of residue remains. This residue should then be buffed off carefully using a PB Super Buffing Towel.

Q²M COMPOUND

Exterior / Paint Correction

High cut compound with clean work and reliable finish.

Q²M Compound is a cutting paste designed to deliver strong defect removal while maintaining a low dust level and a high quality finish. When used with correct technique and an eccentric polisher, it can also function as a one step solution.

Images:
- https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600q2mcompound-1920x1152.webp
- https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2mcompound_120_1000_2024-1024x991.png
- https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mcompound.webp

A cutting compound with very low dust and a great finish.
Q²M Compound balances cutting power and finish quality, helping reduce the need for multiple polishing steps. Its water based formula supports clean work and easy residue removal.

Features:
- LOW DUST
- NO SILICONES
- NO FILLERS

Technical Details:
- Capacities: 120 ML / 1000 ML
- Consumption: 15-40ML/PANEL

How To Use:
01. Apply a small amount of Q²M Compound to a matching polishing pad.
02. Work the product with an eccentric polisher using proper technique.
03. Continue polishing until defects are reduced and the product is worked through.
04. Wipe off residue with a clean microfibre towel.
05. Follow with a finishing polish if required.

Frequently Asked Questions:

01. What type of defects does Q²M Compound remove?
It is designed for scratch and defect removal during paint correction.

02. Does it produce a lot of dust?
No. It is formulated to keep dust to a minimum.

03. Can it be used as a one step product?
Yes, when used correctly with an eccentric polisher.

04. Does it contain fillers or silicone?
No. It is filler free and silicone free.

05. Is it suitable before coating application?
Yes. It leaves a clean surface suitable for coating preparation.

GYEON Q²M Compound+ REDEFINED

Brand: Gyeon

Price: 250ml - $29.99 CAD | 1L - $89.99 CAD

SKU (250ml): 4932.250ml | Barcode: 8809432678144
SKU (1L): 4932.1L | Barcode: 8809432673835

Images:
- //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/GYEON-Q2M-Compound-plus-REDEFINED-1L.webp?v=1710006430&width=1800

HEAVY CUTTING COMPOUND - IMPROVED

Q²M Compound+ Redefined is an enhanced heavy cutting paste that achieves a superior level of scratch removal and high abrasion with minimal dust and limited secondary defects. While it may leave light holograms, these are easily eliminated with a single pass of Q²M Polish.

HIGH CUTTING POWER AND GLOSSY FINISH: Q²M Compound+ Redefined delivers heightened cutting power without the typical drawbacks of significant defects. The water-based formula incorporates high-quality Japanese abrasives, facilitating the swift and effortless removal of harsh defects. The absence of silicone or fillers streamlines the pre-coating preparation and polish removal processes, making them faster and more efficient.

REDEFINED: Introducing our REDEFINED line - at GYEON, we've taken our renowned chemical formulas to an entirely new level. We've meticulously reworked and refined them to ensure unparalleled performance, exceptional durability, and the utmost ease of use. Our commitment is to provide our customers with the best user experience possible.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN: Q²M Compound+ Redefined stands out as a cutting polish unlike any other. Given its water base, optimal results are achieved by reducing both speed and temperature. Work in small sections, moving the machine slowly across the surface. TIP: In comparison to its previous version, Q²M Compound+ Redefined maintains a high level of cutting, extending the working cycle without drying out. It proves particularly effective in high-temperature and humid climates.

CONSUMPTION: 15-40ML/PANEL

CUT: 5/5
FINISH: 4/5

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q²M Compound Plus | Heavy Cut Compounding Paste
sources.cleaned_content:
GYEON - Q²M Compound Plus

Brand: GYEON

Images:
- image/cache/wp/gj/product/g/y/gyeon-compound-plus-250ml-756x698w.webp
- image/cache/wp/gj/product/Gyeon/compound-plus/gyeon-q2m-compound-plus-redefined-250ml-756x698h.webp
- image/cache/wp/gj/product/g/y/gyeon-compound-plus-1000ml-756x698w.webp
- image/cache/wp/gj/product/g/y/gyeon-compound-plus-art-756x698w.webp

Pricing:
- 120ml - £10.00 (inc. vat) / £8.33 (ex VAT) - Stock: 0
- 1 Litre - £48.00 (inc. vat) - Stock: 2

Description:
Gyeon Q²M Compound Plus is a heavy cutting paste that delivers an improved level of scratch removal and high abrasion with a low level of dust and limited secondary defects. Although it does leave light holograms, they are simple to remove with one pass of Gyeon Q²M Polish.

Q²M Compound+ delivers increased cutting power, capable of removing 1500-grit sanding marks without the usual price of enormous defects. The formula is water-based and contains high-quality Japanese abrasives that allow fast and easy removal of harsh defects. Gyeon Compound Plus contains no silicone or fillers make the procedure of pre-coating preparation and polish removal much faster and easier.

Application:
Work with a polishing machine of your choice (rotary, dual-action or orbital with forced rotation). Spread at low revs. Work until fully diminished at medium revs. Wipe off with an HQ microfiber cloth. Use a 1:1 dilution of IPA to remove the remaining product and inspect the effect. If needed, re-use.

Available in 120ml & 1000ml Bottles

sources.page_title: Gyeon Polishing: Unveil Your Car's True Radiance - White Water Solution
sources.cleaned_content:
POLISHING - SUPERB MAINTENANCE PRODUCTS FOR OUTSTANDING DETAILING PERFORMANCE

Q²M Compound:
Q²M Compound is a cutting polishing compound paste, delivering excellent performance and a high level of scratch removal combined with a very low level of dust and an incomparable finish. Correct technique combined with an eccentric polisher allows to use Q²M Compound as a one-step product!

Q²M Compound+:
Q²M Compound+ is a heavy cutting polish compound paste that delivers an improved level of scratch removal and high abrasion with a low level of dust and limited secondary defects. Although it does leave light holograms, they are simple to remove with one pass of Q²M Polish.

Images:
- https://whitewatersolution.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/q2mcompound.jpg
- https://whitewatersolution.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/q2mcompoundplus.jpg

Q² Primer:
Q² Primer is an ultra-light finish and SiO2 coating primer. It provides superb pre-coating surface preparation and an incredibly glossy finish. Its main aim is to perfect the finish on the paints which are hardest to work with, dramatically reducing the risk of scratch marks during the final wipe off before applying a ceramic coating. Q² Primer leaves a smooth and slick surface, ready to coat.

Q²M PPF RENEW:
Maintaining paint protection film has never been that easy. Q²M PPF Renew combines light abrasive particles with protective (and repellent) additives, creating a resistant and highly self-cleaning finish. The PPF polish allows both machine and hand application, removing haze and oxidation while leaving a smooth, glossy and repellent finish. It is the world's first maintenance product containing silica and designed from scratch to work at its best on all types of PPF, including modern self-healing films.

Q²M Polish:
Q2M Polish is a high quality and fine finishing polish to bring out the most gloss and clarity of your paint system. With a medium level of cut and high level of finish it is also a great one step polish using low oils, no fillers, and high quality diminishing abrasives.

Q²M Metal Polish:
Q²M MetalPolish is the number one metal and chrome polish cream solution when it comes to restoring and polishing metal, aluminium, stainless steel or chrome parts. Highly effective, safe on all surfaces and very easy to use.
